mnemonics: PROCURE: Planning, Requirements, Options, Contract, Use, Review, Evaluate
keyPoints: Procurement is a structured cycle, not a one-time event.
It involves multiple stages including needs assessment, vendor selection, and contract management.
Effective procurement aligns IT acquisitions with long-term strategic business goals.
commonMistakes: Treating procurement as a simple purchase order instead of a strategic process.
Focusing only on initial cost rather than Total Cost of Ownership (TCO).
Neglecting to plan for the ongoing management and maintenance of the acquired asset.
